== Notes for [[Item:Q83586|Q83586]] ==

ID: I64678

Name: Boinia Procilla Sevilla

Given Name: Boinia Procilla

Surname: Sevilla

Sex: F

_UID: 4873CCBEDB92E24BBD1850ED311EB6B9AF60

Change Date: 29 Jun 2004

Death: Y

Marriage 1 Arrius Antonius Calpernius Piso

Married:

Children

Pompeia Plotina Claudia Piso

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I64678

OR "PRISCILLA""PRISCA"

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
